data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version-safe updates to plugin-managed dictionaries. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for version-safe updates, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that such updates are implemented or functioning as required, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of version-safe updates to plugin-managed dictionaries.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
